summary: High‑fidelity, soundboard‑like recording with crystal‑clear clarity; musical performance not discussed.
review: Reviewers praise the exceptional audio quality, saying it feels like standing right in front of the mixing board when cranked up. No comments were made about the band's playing or specific songs, so the show itself remains uncharacterized.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one positive review focusing on recording quality; no information on performance to adjust rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very clear and direct sound; reviewers liken it to being at the sound board, with no reported issues.
